pages.raw_text:
Milton Todd, the democratic NOM
inee for county superintendent OF
schools, is making an active can
paign for an office which, while not
one to attract attention as a politi-
cal job, has nevertheless great in
fuence on future generations of the
body polite. Scholarly as himself,
Mr.. Todd's work in his own behalf
as prospective Office holder is char
acterized by dignity and able dis
cussion of all that pertains to the
management of the schools. One
of Mr.. Todd's chief arguments is to-
ward the enlistment of teachers who
are in sympathy with their work.
Another plank in his platform is
that all teachers under the jurisdic-
ton of the county superintendent
have equal chance of advancement
in return for good work, and the
wedding out of those who are not
up to standard.
